tasks.title: Add public cohort word search
tasks.objective: Implement a simple word-based search on the public cohorts page while preserving current visibility rules.
authority: Implement dependency-free word-based search suitable for the current MVP.
Preserve existing open/active public feed visibility rules and private-link protection.
Do not add feedback tasks to the main task ledger.
acceptance_criteria: `/cohorts` renders a search control for filtering cohorts by words.
Search matches meaningful public fields such as title, description, topic, category, audience, and skill.
Search is case-insensitive and handles multi-word input predictably.
No-results state is clear when no public cohorts match.
Search results never expose private meeting links or non-public cohort statuses.
Focused tests cover matching, non-matching, and visibility-safe search behavior.
verification: Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when public cohort search works and verification passes.
tasks.evidence: 2026-06-13: Added server-side `/cohorts?q=` word search across public-safe cohort fields, rendered search/clear/no-results UI, preserved open/active and private-link visibility rules, and verified with focused event browsing tests plus `npm run check`.
